grant_type.description: The type of grant. Supported grant types are: `password`, `_kerberos`, `client_credentials`, and `refresh_token`.

scope.description: The scope of the token. Currently tokens are only issued for a scope of FULL regardless of the value sent with the request.

password.description: The user's password. If you specify the `password` grant type, this parameter is required. This parameter is not valid with any other supported grant type.

kerberos_ticket.description: The base64 encoded kerberos ticket. If you specify the `_kerberos` grant type, this parameter is required. This parameter is not valid with any other supported grant type.

refresh_token.description: The string that was returned when you created the token, which enables you to extend its life. If you specify the `refresh_token` grant type, this parameter is required. This parameter is not valid with any other supported grant type.

username.description: The username that identifies the user. If you specify the `password` grant type, this parameter is required. This parameter is not valid with any other supported grant type.
